title: Egyptian Spicy Potato Bake
description: A flavorful and aromatic potato bake inspired by Egyptian cuisine, with a spicy kick. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Peel the potatoes and slice them into 1/2-inch thick rounds.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced potatoes, onion, garlic, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper. Toss to coat.
Transfer the potato mixture to a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Drizzle the spicy tomato sauce over the potatoes.
Dot the top of the potatoes with butter.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender and golden brown.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
